MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Catherine Weiderhold, Esq (415-533-9735) for Plaintiff and moving party Tito Cardona.
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TITO CARDONA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
